title: Death Animations (Video Player)
description: Plays videos on death with a highly customizable setup.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64e71f48204cfc3c634dcb8a7e0ba30cf15f6262.png)Death Animations lets you replace the “death moment” with a **custom animation** using your own media.

* Choose between **Direct Video** playback (use `.mp4/.webm`) or **Frames Mode** (pre-generated **PNG frames** for smoother, more consistent performance).
* Comes with an **automatic FFmpeg setup** so video decoding and frame generation work without installing anything system-wide.
* Optional **green screen (chroma key)** settings to remove a keyed background color.
* Includes **server-side options** for respawn flow and spectator behavior after death.

Install the mod, launch the game once to complete setup, then open the mod config to select your video or frame set.

>  ## **[WIKI](https://catman0221.github.io/death-animations-video-player-wiki/en/)**
